description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test the code coverage that runs on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a Python 3.9 matrix that checks out the repository, sets up Python, upgrades pip, installs dependencies, and then installs various tools including LLVM, Clang, Z3, Bitwuzla, Capstone, Unicorn, and LIEF. Finally, compile Triton and run unittests with code coverage reporting.
